evidence.text:
exculpatory bottom line message smuggled through the occlusions in "Tears". No wonder that in 3-74 I saw the word "Felix" as the key word. It is, Happy. + Jason Taverner (i.e. Dionysos - a drinker) being found innocent. So I wasn't emotionally programmed to see it. But that is the real message:

Not: {serious King} Felix

but: serious {King Felix}

I hope the message reached someone besides me. Anyhow, thanks to "Precious Artifact" I conceived of a 3-layer occlusion, rather that 2. How clever! (

Camouflaged, he has already successfully extruded himself - + sentient purpose - into blindforces Form II (lower realm); though we can't see it this (evil) realm has been subverted.➀
